scripts.dev: bun run packages/cli/src/index.ts serve --ui-only --port 3000 & bun run --cwd packages/ui dev
scripts.serve: bun run build:ui && bun run packages/cli/src/index.ts serve --ui-only
scripts.ci: bun run lint:md && bun run typecheck && bun test packages/core/src/ && bun test packages/crawlers/src/ && bun test packages/mcp/src/ && (cd packages/ui && npx vitest run) && bun run build:ui && (cd packages/worker && bun run build)
